element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns horizontal scrolling shooter fundamentals before enemy pressure increases
Core mechanic: firing TOZ device at enemies to inherit their weapons; repeated contact strengthens captured weapon up to max level
Players discover weapons via enemy contact; visual appearance changes reflect weapon strength meter progression
Difficulty escalates as enemy behaviors become more complex; requires adaptive strategy

typical_relief_triggers: Successfully capturing enemy weapon via TOZ System
typical_tension_triggers: Weapon weakness against current enemy type
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating difficulty curve; early stages teach mechanics, mid/late stages demand precise weapon selection and enemy pattern recognition; noted by reviewers as 'the toughest horizontally scrolling shoot 'em up available on the Mega Drive'

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introductory phase teaching TOZ capture mechanic and basic navigation; manageable enemy density allows learning window
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Enemy patterns and density increase; weapon selection becomes strategic; requires understanding which captured weapons counter specific enemy types
difficulty_curve.late_game: High-pressure encounters demanding mastery of all 18 weapons and precise positioning; boss encounters represent significant skill checks
notable_spikes: Transition from learning phase to combat-heavy stages
Final bosses requiring full weapon mastery and pattern memorization

notable_level_patterns.description: Each stage introduces or emphasizes different enemy types, each wielding distinct weapons. Player must fire TOZ System to contact enemies, inherit their weapon, and strengthen it through repeated contact. Weapon appearance changes visually as strength meter fills, providing feedback on progression.

With 18 weapons available, later stages require players to anticipate which weapon works best against upcoming enemy formations. Wrong weapon choice creates tension; switching to appropriate weapon provides relief.

Stage progression culminates in boss encounters. Boss defeat provides major relief and progression. Boss patterns create cycles of high tension (attack phase) and medium tension (recovery window for player attack).
